narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,011 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
